description: Two card-endpoints. Both equal nodes. Must be traversable from either side. Hence the mirror. Sigh logged. The connection itself is structurally clean — evolution-line pair, compass-metaphor completes across the type-shift (Rock to Rock/Steel), Probopass's three Mini-Noses literally complete what Nosepass started. Worth the work.
citations: [Pokemondb.net: Nosepass / Probopass species pages, via WebSearch]
